items.title: GLM 5.2 and the coming AI margin collapse
items.title_zh: GLM 5.2 与即将到来的人工智能利润崩溃
items.title_en: GLM 5.2 and the Coming AI Margin Collapse
items.summary: Article argues that falling AI inference costs driven by models like GLM 5.2 could lead to margin collapse for AI companies, sparking debate on HN about the economics of AI.

items.title: Ternlight – 7 MB embedding model that runs in browser (WASM)
items.title_zh: Ternlight：7MB嵌入模型通过WASM在浏览器中运行
items.title_en: Ternlight: 7MB Embedding Model Runs in Browser via WASM
items.summary: A 7MB embedding model distilled from MiniLM runs in browser via WASM, enabling offline semantic search.

items.title: A global workspace in language models
items.title_zh: 语言模型中的全局工作空间
items.summary: Anthropic research identifies a shared 'global workspace' subspace in language models that mediates reasoning across diverse contexts.

items.title: tencent/Hy3
items.title_zh: 腾讯发布Hy3：295B参数MoE模型，21B活跃参数
items.title_en: Tencent Releases Hy3: 295B MoE Model with 21B Active Parameters
items.summary: Tencent releases Hy3, a 295B-parameter MoE model with 21B active parameters, outperforming similar-sized models and rivaling larger open-source models, under Apache 2.0 license.

items.title: OpenWrt One – Open Hardware Router
items.title_zh: OpenWrt One：开源路由器硬件发布
items.title_en: OpenWrt One: Open-Source Router Hardware Announced
items.summary: OpenWrt announces an open hardware router model, OpenWrt One, with community interest in its capabilities and future iterations.

items.title: Resetting Xbox
items.title_zh: 微软Xbox部门重组以提升利润率
items.title_en: Microsoft Xbox Resets to Boost Profit Margins
items.summary: Microsoft's Xbox division is resetting to improve profit margins despite generating $5 billion quarterly revenue, sparking debate about its strategy and the broader gaming industry's direction.

items.title: CoMaps – FOSS Offline Maps
items.title_zh: CoMaps：引发治理讨论的自由开源离线地图分支
items.title_en: CoMaps: FOSS Offline Maps Fork with Governance Debate
items.summary: CoMaps is a free open-source offline maps app forked from Organic Maps, with community debate about its governance and usability differences.

items.title: Linux on the Atari Jaguar
items.title_en: Linux Ported to Atari Jaguar on Original Hardware
items.summary: A detailed guide on running a modern Linux kernel on the Atari Jaguar console using only original hardware.

items.title: OfficeCLI: Office suite for AI agents to read and edit Microsoft Office files
items.title_en: OfficeCLI: AI Agents' Open-Source Office Suite
items.summary: OfficeCLI is an open-source CLI tool for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Microsoft Office files without requiring Office installation.

items.title: Aluminum foil (2021)
items.title_zh: 铝箔的惊人深度与多功能性
items.title_en: The surprising depth and versatility of aluminum foil
items.summary: A detailed appreciation of aluminum foil's properties, uses, and cultural significance, sparking a lively discussion.

items.title: sqlite-utils 4.0rc3
items.title_zh: sqlite-utils 4.0rc3 新增复合外键支持
items.summary: Release candidate for sqlite-utils 4.0 adds compound foreign key support and case-insensitive column matching.
